opportunities.title: MDRT EDGE 2026 – Call for Speakers (Non-Member Proposals Open)
opportunities.fit_reason: MDRT's EDGE conference explicitly seeks non-member speakers on sales strategies and business practices for financial services professionals, a natural fit for a trust-based sales coach.

opportunities.title: Sales Enablement Summit – Sydney
opportunities.deadline: Not specified; register/apply via event site
opportunities.fit_reason: A senior-management-heavy sales enablement audience in Sydney is an ideal setting for content on trust-based selling and building sustainable B2B sales culture.

opportunities.title: Vistage Speaker Program
opportunities.date: Ongoing (year-round speaking engagements with CEO peer groups)
opportunities.deadline: Rolling application (priority given to those with a Chair-arranged meeting)
opportunities.fit_reason: Vistage regularly books outside experts on sales and leadership topics to speak to its CEO and executive peer groups, matching a trust-based sales leadership keynote offering.

opportunities.title: ANA Speaker Submission (Marketing Conferences Seeking Speakers)
opportunities.fit_reason: ANA continuously accepts speaker proposals for its national industry conferences (including B2B-focused events), offering an avenue to pitch sales-culture and trust-building content to marketing/sales leadership audiences.

opportunities.title: OutBound Conference 2026
opportunities.deadline: Not an open CFP; outreach via organizers recommended
opportunities.fit_reason: Billed as the premier sales training and leadership conference, OutBound draws sales leaders and individual contributors who are a core audience for trust-based selling content.

opportunities.title: Shore Sales & Marketing Leadership Summit 2026
opportunities.deadline: Priority tickets on sale now; speaking inquiries via event site
opportunities.fit_reason: A leadership-focused sales and marketing summit emphasizing building standards and trust-based team confidence, aligning closely with a trust-based sales leadership keynote.

opportunities.title: National Sales Network Professional Conference & Career Fair 2026
opportunities.fit_reason: This large national sales association conference features 20+ expert-led workshops on sales and leadership, a strong venue for a trust-based sales culture keynote.

opportunities.title: IAB Australia MeasureUp 2026 – Speaker Submissions Open
opportunities.fit_reason: Speaker submissions are open now for this Sydney event on marketing/measurement effectiveness, where a session on building trust in B2B relationships and go-to-market culture could fit the program's push for fresh, non-promotional thinking.

opportunities.title: Selling Trust Podcast
opportunities.deadline: Open for guest pitches on an ongoing basis
opportunities.fit_reason: This podcast is built entirely around the premise of building sales relationships through trust rather than pressure tactics, making it a near-perfect thematic match for a trust-based sales coach guest.

opportunities.title: Make It Happen Mondays – B2B Sales Talk with John Barrows
opportunities.fit_reason: A long-running, high-profile B2B sales leadership podcast that regularly hosts sales trainers, coaches, and authors discussing trust, culture, and modern selling fundamentals.

opportunities.title: Sales Gravy Podcast (incl. "Ask Jeb" segment)
opportunities.fit_reason: The world's most-downloaded sales podcast frequently features guest sales coaches (including international guests such as an Australian sales founder) discussing consultative, trust-based, and integrity-driven selling.

opportunities.title: Sales Podcasts Looking for Guests (Directory)
opportunities.deadline: Open — rolling submissions to multiple shows
opportunities.fit_reason: A curated directory of active sales-focused podcasts (e.g., Creating Distance, sales-leadership shows) currently seeking guests, useful for pitching trust-based selling expertise across multiple shows at once.

opportunities.title: Best Sales Podcasts That Book Guests (2026 Directory)
opportunities.fit_reason: Lists guest-friendly sales-leadership podcasts specifically noted as welcoming to sales coaches and fractional CROs with proprietary frameworks, matching a trust-based selling positioning.
